description: Render document pages to PNG files for multimodal agents that must see figures, tables, or handwriting (lit screenshot).
rules: read-only — never mutates the input file
TARGET_PAGES selects pages (e.g. '1,3,5' or '1-5'); empty renders all
DPI controls render resolution (default 150; higher is sharper, slower)
PNGs written under record_store/screenshots; an index manifest is written under record_store
usage: Set INPUT_FILE, optional TARGET_PAGES (e.g. '1,3,5'), optional DPI. Output: screenshots.json manifest + PNGs under screenshots/.
limitation: Requires the liteparse package at runtime; when absent the porter writes a graceful placeholder manifest so the contract still holds. Non-PDF inputs need LibreOffice/ImageMagick.
